findings.description: The source contains 4 h3-level subsections (ファイルのダウンロード方法, BLOB型カラムのダウンロード方法, データレコードのダウンロード方法, 別ウィンドウを開きダウンロードを開始したい場合) with combined content well over 2000 characters. The knowledge file consolidates all into a single section (s1) without splitting. Per V3 rules, an h2 section ≥ 2000 chars with h3 subsections should be split into multiple knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has 4 subsections under ファイルダウンロードの実現方法, each delimited with ==== underlines.

findings.description: `popupButton` tag is used in the knowledge file content for the separate-window download scenario but is absent from the hints array, reducing discoverability when users ask about popup or separate-window download patterns.
findings.source_evidence: Source section 別ウィンドウを開きダウンロードを開始したい場合 uses `<n:popupButton>` tag; knowledge file mentions `popupButton`タグで別ウィンドウを開き but does not include `popupButton` in hints.
